caption:
Most 5-star reviews die within 24 hours of the job, because nobody asks at the right moment.

Ask same-day, within an hour of the invoice. Satisfaction fades fast, and so does the memory of what made the job great.

Screen every job for a complaint first. Never send a review request to a customer who's still upset. Route them to you instead.

One follow-up text, three days later, if they haven't clicked. Never a second follow-up.

Want this running automatically after every completed job?

DM "REVIEWS"

#HomeServices #ContractorBusiness #HVAC #Roofing #SmallBusinessGrowth
rationale: Carousels drive the save and DM-share signals the algorithm weights most, and this angle gives owners the exact script, timing window, and complaint filter for review generation, a gap the account hasn't covered yet.
